translation.literal_translation: And indeed, in this way, there is exposition and question only of those three. (6)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.6: both the narrative presentation and interrogative structure are restricted to exactly three referents; therefore pradhana cannot be imported as a fourth topic.
translation.interpretive_note: Formal closure of the tri-topic argument from Katha dialogue structure.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Sutra brevity is preserved and unpacked only in the technical line.
Threefold referent reading is context-dependent on the adjoining bhashya blocks.
